title: Gremlin becomes primary when your primary is removed

card.rawText: If your primary creature is removed from the field, you may play this card as your primary creature. This card returns to being a magic card if it leaves the field.

effect.value: If your primary creature is removed from the field, you may play this card as your primary creature. This card returns to being a magic card if it leaves the field.

plan.title: Gremlin becomes primary when your primary is removed
plan.summary: When your primary creature leaves the field, verify Gremlin may be played as your primary creature and later returns to magic-card identity.

notes: Read text first: If your primary creature is removed from the field, you may play this card as your primary creature. This card returns to being a magic card if it leaves the field.
